sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88931" key="prosdu/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσδύνω</orth>, <sense id="n88931.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be near setting,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(1).139</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
